casepack.title: Dynamic Semiotics — 3 Sign Systems (Tier-2)
casepack.description: Dynamic semiotics domain closure demonstrating GCD kernel applied to 3 sign systems. 8-channel semiotic trace with equal weights. Shows living language (Watch), dead language (Collapse from dead community channels), and formal notation (near-Stable, highest fidelity).

run_intent.notes: Exercises the dynamic semiotics closure with 3 sign systems: English (living language — moderate heterogeneity, Watch), Classical Latin (dead language — community/speaker channels near 0.10–0.30 cause Collapse, analogous to confinement in particle physics), Mathematical notation (highest fidelity F=0.881, near institutional stability). Demonstrates semiotic sign drift maps to Tier-1 omega and ground persistence maps to fidelity F.
